# parasail Provider

Unofficial Terraform provider for Parasail. It is a community project, not affiliated with or endorsed by Parasail, and is built entirely on top of Parasail's public Control API.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_version = ">= 1.6.0"

  required_providers {
    parasail = {
      source  = "registry.terraform.io/loewenthal-corp/parasail"
      version = ">= 0.1.0"
    }
  }
}

provider "parasail" {
  api_key = var.parasail_api_key
}

variable "parasail_api_key" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Parasail API key. May also be set with PARASAIL_API_KEY.
- `endpoint` (String) Parasail API endpoint. May also be set with PARASAIL_ENDPOINT.
- `operation_timeout_minutes` (Number) Timeout for asynchronous deployment operations. Defaults to 60.
- `poll_interval_seconds` (Number) Polling interval for asynchronous deployment operations. Defaults to 30.
- `request_timeout_seconds` (Number) HTTP request timeout in seconds. Defaults to 60.
